events.title: Annual Scientific Conference 2026
events.description: Join us for the Annual Scientific Conference featuring keynote speakers from across the country. Topics: One Health approach, Antimicrobial resistance, Zoonotic diseases, Modern surgery techniques. Registration fee: BDT 2,000 (members), BDT 3,000 (non-members). Lunch and refreshments included.

events.title: Hands-on Workshop: Small Animal Surgery
events.description: Practical workshop on small animal surgical techniques. Limited to 30 participants. Led by Dr. Md. Siddiqul Islam and team. Materials will be provided. Registration: BDT 3,500.

events.title: CPD: Poultry Disease Management
events.description: Continuing Professional Development session on poultry disease management in commercial farms. Free for CPVA members. 3 CPD credits.

events.title: World Veterinary Day Celebration
events.description: CPVA celebrated World Veterinary Day with a public awareness rally, free pet vaccination camp, and cultural program. Over 200 pets were vaccinated.

events.title: Annual General Meeting 2025
events.description: The 2025 AGM was held with 85% member attendance. New executive committee was elected for 2026-2027 term.
